# SBDC Houston 77084 Quick Routing Summary

## Primary interpretation
The SBA local-assistance SBDC search for ZIP 77084 returns local resources in Harris County, Texas and displays four SBA Resource Partner SBDC results: Lee College SBDC, Prairie View A&M University SBDC, San Jacinto College SBDC, and University of Houston SBDC.

## BOSS routing rule for ZIP 77084
Use the official SBA/SBDC locator link first. ZIP 77084 is in the Houston/Katy/west Harris area, and some service-area pages distinguish central/north Harris, east Harris, southwest Harris, Waller County, and Fort Bend County. Do not assume one center is the final fit without checking the locator or asking the user for their exact business address/county.

## Practical local routing
- First local source: SBA local-assistance result for SBDC near 77084.
- Likely Houston metro advising hub: Houston Center SBDC, which provides no-cost confidential business advising and serves Central/North Harris County.
- Southwest Harris / Fort Bend proximity check: Fort Bend County SBDC, listed by the UH SBDC locations catalog as serving Fort Bend, Matagorda, Wharton, and Southwest Harris.
- Waller/Katy-region proximity check: Prairie View A&M SBDC, listed as serving Grimes and Waller counties.
- East Harris routing: Lee College and San Jacinto College SBDCs cover East Harris-adjacent service areas.

## Next best action for user-facing BOSS response
Ask: "Is your business address or planned operating address in Harris County, Fort Bend County, Waller County, or somewhere else?" Then route to the official locator and the closest service-area SBDC.
